prompt: Create a solution spec: Onboard.ai Provides Pre-built,AI. Target user: Notion-using small business owners and team leads. Solution: Onboard.ai provides pre-built, templated workspaces and workflow automation tools for cross-functional teams in Notion. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: Templatehub Is AnAI. Target user: In-house Notion developers and dev teams. Solution: TemplateHub is an enterprise Notion template repository and governance platform for teams to discover, customize, and manage their standard operating procedures. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: Workplacewise Provides UsageAI. Target user: Notion-using small business leaders and stakeholders. Solution: WorkplaceWise provides usage tracking, analytics, and reporting for Notion templates, enabling leaders to optimize team workflows and productivity. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: A Workflow AutomationAI. Target user: Tech leaders in charge of remote engineering teams with a high turnover rate. Solution: A workflow automation tool that simplifies the hiring and onboarding process for remote cloud engineers, including assessment, onboarding, and knowledge sharing. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: An Ai-powered SdrAI. Target user: Sales Operations Manager in mid-sized B2B software companies. Solution: An AI-powered SDR onboarding platform providing personalized sales playbooks, training modules, and coaching tools to maximize new rep performance. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription
